7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_FUNCTIONMANAGER_H
9 #define ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_FUNCTIONMANAGER_H
10 /* Author : desrozis at Tue Oct 30 16:51:25 2012
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 /*
15  * \ingroup Law
16  * \brief Base de donnees de fonctions
17  *
18  * Voir les fonctions de remplissage dans Function.h
19  * Les algorithmes doivent etre retenus en memoire par l'application
20  *
21  * \code
22  *
23  * FunctionManager function_mng;
24  *
25  * ExampleAlgo algo();
26  * ExampleAlgo::Signature signature;
27  *
28  * // Remplissage de la signature
29  * ...
30  *
31  * function_mng << createFunction(0, algo, signature);
32  *
33  * info() << function_mng;
34  *
35  * const IFunction& f = function_mng[0];
36  *
37  * info() << f;
38  *
39  * \endcode
40  *
41  */
42 
43 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/Function.h"
44 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/EvalFunctionTraits.h"
45 
46 #include <map>
47 
48 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
49 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
50 
51 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
52 
53 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
54 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
55 
56 /*
57  * \ingroup Law
58  * \brief Classe de stockage des fonctions
59  *
60  * Met e disposition les dependances par proprietes
61  *
62  */
63 class FunctionManager
64 {
65 private:
66 
67  typedef std::shared_ptr<IFunction> FunctionPtr;
68  typedef Arcane::SharedArray<FunctionPtr> FunctionVector;
69  typedef std::map< Integer,FunctionPtr> FunctionMap;
70  typedef std::map<Property, PropertyVector> DependenciesMap;
71 
72 public:
73 
75  class Enumerator
76  {
77  public:
78  Enumerator(const FunctionVector& f)
79  : m_functions(f)
80  , m_current(m_functions.begin())
81  , m_end(m_functions.end())
82  , m_count(0) {}
83  Enumerator(const Enumerator& e)
84  : m_functions(e.m_functions)
85  , m_current(e.m_current)
86  , m_end(e.m_end)
87  , m_count(e.m_count) {}
88  void reset() { m_current = m_functions.begin(); m_count = 0; }
89  bool hasNext() const { return m_current != m_end; }
90  void operator++() { m_current++; m_count++; }
91  const IFunction& function() const { return **m_current; }
92  Integer functionId() const { return (*m_current)->id(); }
93  Integer count() const { return m_count; }
94  Integer size() const { return m_functions.size(); }
95  private:
96  FunctionVector m_functions;
97  FunctionVector::const_iterator m_current;
98  FunctionVector::const_iterator m_end;
99  Integer m_count;
100  };
101 
102  FunctionManager(bool fatal_if_unregistered = false, bool verbose = true);
103 
104  virtual ~FunctionManager(){}
105 
107  void enableVerbosity() { m_verbose = true; }
108 
110  void disableVerbosity() { m_verbose = false; }
111 
113  FunctionManager& operator<<(FunctionPtr f);
114 
116  void registerOrReplace(FunctionPtr f);
117 
119  bool contains(const Property& p) const;
120 
122  const IFunction& operator[](Integer i) const;
123 
125  const IFunction& operator[](const Property& p) const;
126 
128  inline Integer size() const { return static_cast<Arcane::Integer>(m_all_functions.size()); }
129 
131  inline Enumerator functions() const { return m_functions; }
132 
134  inline Enumerator parameters() const { return m_parameters; }
135 
137  Enumerator functions(Arcane::IntegerConstArrayView ids) const;
138 
140  Enumerator functions(Arcane::IntegerConstArrayView idx_input,
141  Arcane::IntegerConstArrayView idx_ouput) const;
142 
144  const PropertyVector& dependencies(const Property& p) const { return m_dependencies[p]; }
145 
147  void recomputeDependencies();
148 
149 private:
150 
152  bool m_verbose;
153 
155  Arcane::ITraceMng* m_trace;
156 
158  bool m_fatal_if_unregistered;
159 
161  FunctionMap m_all_functions;
162  FunctionMap m_functions_by_property;
163 
165  mutable DependenciesMap m_dependencies;
166 
168  FunctionVector m_functions;
169 
171  FunctionVector m_parameters;
172 };
173 
174 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
175 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
176 
177 std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& nout, const FunctionManager& f);
178 
179 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
180 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
181 
182 // !TODO deplacer la partie creation
183 
185 template<typename T>
186 inline std::shared_ptr<IFunction> createFunction(Integer id, const T& algo, const typename T::Signature& signature)
187 {
188  static_assert(EvalFunctionTraits<T>::is_valid, "Law is not valid - are eval methods const?");
189 
190  return std::shared_ptr<IFunction>(new FunctionT<T>(id,algo,signature,false));
191 }
192 
193 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
194 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
195 
197 template<typename T>
198 inline std::shared_ptr<IFunction> createParameterFunction(Integer id, const T& algo, const typename T::Signature& signature)
199 {
200  return std::shared_ptr<IFunction>(new FunctionT<T>(id,algo,signature,true));
201 }
202 
203 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
204 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
205 
206 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
207 
208 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
209 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
210 
211 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_FUNCTIONMANAGER_H */
